before_cleaning.description: Average words per sample before cleaning

after_cleaning.description: Average words per sample after stopword removal and cleaning

Society & Culture.title: Why do people say 'bless you'?
Society & Culture.content: When someone sneezes, it's polite to say bless you. Why is this?
Society & Culture.best_answer: It comes from ancient times when people thought sneezing expelled evil spirits.

Society & Culture.title: What is the meaning of life?
Society & Culture.content: Philosophical question about the purpose of human existence.

Science & Mathematics.title: What is the square root of -1?
Science & Mathematics.content: I am having trouble with complex numbers in my math class.
Science & Mathematics.best_answer: It is denoted by the imaginary unit 'i'.

Science & Mathematics.title: How do black holes form?
Science & Mathematics.content: What happens when a massive star collapses?
Science & Mathematics.best_answer: They form when a massive star undergoes gravitational collapse at the end of its life cycle.

Health.title: What are symptoms of a sinus infection?
Health.content: I have a headache and facial pain, could it be my sinuses?
Health.best_answer: Yes, common symptoms include nasal congestion, facial pain, and a headache.

Health.title: How many calories in a banana?
Health.content: I am trying to track my macros for my diet.
Health.best_answer: A medium-sized banana typically contains around 105 calories.

Education & Reference.title: How to cite a website in APA?
Education & Reference.content: I need to put a website source in my essay bibliography.
Education & Reference.best_answer: Author, A. A. (Year, Month Date). Title of page. Site name. URL

Education & Reference.title: What are good colleges for engineering?
Education & Reference.content: Looking for universities with strong mechanical engineering programs.
Education & Reference.best_answer: MIT, Stanford, and Caltech are widely regarded as top engineering schools.

Computers & Internet.title: How to reinstall Windows 10?
Computers & Internet.content: My PC is running slow and I want to do a clean install.
Computers & Internet.best_answer: Use the Windows Media Creation tool to create a bootable USB drive.

Computers & Internet.title: Why is my internet so slow?
Computers & Internet.content: My Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting and speeds are very low.
Computers & Internet.best_answer: Could be interference, distance from router, or issues with your ISP.

Sports.title: Who won the Super Bowl last year?
Sports.content: I missed the game and want to know the final score.
Sports.best_answer: You can check the NFL official website for recent championship results.

Sports.title: What is the offside rule in soccer?
Sports.best_answer: A player is offside if they are nearer to the opponents' goal line than both the ball and the second-last opponent.

Business & Finance.title: How to invest in stocks?
Business & Finance.content: I have some savings and want to start trading in the stock market.
Business & Finance.best_answer: Open a brokerage account, research index funds, and start small.

Business & Finance.title: What happens if I file taxes late?
Business & Finance.content: Missed the deadline, what are the penalties?
Business & Finance.best_answer: You may face failure-to-file and failure-to-pay penalties from the IRS.

Entertainment & Music.title: What is the best movie of 2010?
Entertainment & Music.content: Looking for good film recommendations from that year.
Entertainment & Music.best_answer: Inception and The Social Network are highly acclaimed movies from 2010.

Entertainment & Music.title: How to play guitar chords?
Entertainment & Music.content: Just got a guitar and want to learn basic strumming.
Entertainment & Music.best_answer: Start with basic open chords like G, C, D, and E minor.

Family & Relationships.title: How to deal with a stubborn teenager?
Family & Relationships.content: My son won't listen to my advice, need parenting tips.
Family & Relationships.best_answer: Keep communication open, pick your battles, and listen without judgment.

Family & Relationships.title: What are good wedding gifts?
Family & Relationships.content: Going to a friend's wedding and don't know what to buy.
Family & Relationships.best_answer: Check their wedding registry, or cash is always a practical and appreciated gift.

Politics & Government.title: How does the electoral college work?
Politics & Government.content: Can someone explain the US voting system for presidency?
Politics & Government.best_answer: States are allocated electors based on their Congressional representation; a candidate needs 270 to win.

Politics & Government.title: What is a filibuster?
Politics & Government.content: Hearing this term on the news a lot regarding the Senate.
Politics & Government.best_answer: It's a tactic used in the Senate to delay or block a vote on a bill by extending debate.
